api_scope.description: Defines the API scope for the Firestore index, specifying the range of access permissions required for the index operations.

collection.description: Specifies the Firestore collection to create the index for; must match an existing collection name.

database.description: Specifies the Firestore database ID where the index will be created, typically 'default' for most use cases.

density.description: Defines the specific field level density to optimize query performance for Firestore indexes; ensure alignment with query requirements.

fields.description: Defines the document fields to be indexed, including their order and query scope; must specify field paths and indexing modes.
fields.type: list(object({array_config: optional(string),field_path: optional(string),order: optional(string),vector_config: list(object({dimension: optional(number),flat: list(object({}))}))}))

multikey.description: Specifies the fields for a composite index, allowing multi-field queries. At least two fields are required.

query_scope.description: Defines the scope of the query for the Firestore index, such as "COLLECTION" or "COLLECTION_GROUP".

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout configuration for creating, updating, or deleting the Firestore index, ensuring operations complete within the specified duration.
